auth.logoAlt: Compra Mais — Rio Branco · Public Procurement Digital System · Transparency, Trust, Efficiency, Partnership

signup.title: Supplier registration
signup.subtitle: Enter the company's Tax ID (CNPJ). The data is automatically validated with the Federal Revenue Service.
signup.loading: Looking up data at the Federal Revenue Service…
signup.manualLink: Federal Revenue Service unavailable? Fill in manually
signup.consent: I authorize the processing of my data for accreditation purposes, in accordance with the LGPD.

errors.cnpjInvalido: Invalid CNPJ. Check the numbers you entered.
errors.situacao: CNPJ with a non-active registration status — registration not allowed.
errors.cnpjDuplicado: This CNPJ is already registered. Use account recovery.
errors.emailDuplicado: This e-mail is already in use. Sign in or use another e-mail.
errors.generico: Could not complete the registration. Please try again.

signup.statusNote: Your account will start with the Applicant status.

login.title: Access the platform
login.subtitle: Sign in with your registered e-mail and password.

covalidacao.vazio: No documents for the current filters.

gerirEditais.subtitulo: Create, publish and close individualized tenders (1 department per tender).

contestacoes.subtitulo: Accept (corrects the tender) or reject (with a reason) the challenges.

auditoria.subtitulo: Query and export of the append-only trail (read-only).
auditoria.vazio: No records for the current filters.

contestacao.subtitulo: Track your accreditations across public notices and resume any that are still in draft.

busca.placeholder: Search by notice number or title…

vazio.descricao: Open an available notice and click “Start Accreditation” to begin.

capacidade.descricao: Enter the maximum amount your company can deliver. The system uses this number as the ceiling in the mathematical allocation — you never receive demand above your capacity.
capacidade.label: Maximum capacity (sets)
capacidade.dica: You may declare any value up to the total demand of the notice. Companies with lower capacity still compete normally in the allocation.
capacidade.teto1: Your declared capacity becomes the maximum limit of items that can be allocated to your company.
capacidade.teto2: The notice's demand is divided among the eligible suppliers, respecting each one's ceiling.
capacidade.teto3: The unmet balance goes to the Reserve Registry, triggered in a 2nd demand.

documentos.descricao: Valid documents submitted in previous notices are reused automatically. You only need to attach what is missing.
documentos.arraste: Drag the PDF here (upload will be integrated later)
documentos.limite: PDF up to 10 MB · will be compressed for SEI

provaVida.descricao: Liveness check to validate the signature, matching the face against the identity document. This step is optional.

enviado.descricao: Your proposal for {{edital}} has been submitted to the Bidding Committee.

documentos.subtituloPagina: Your company's central repository. Automatically reused in new tenders.
documentos.formatosAceitos: Accepted formats: PDF, JPG or PNG.
documentos.alertaExpirados_one: {{count}} expired document. Update the documents below to keep participating in tenders.
documentos.alertaExpirados_other: {{count}} expired documents. Update the documents below to keep participating in tenders.

transparencia.subtituloPagina: Distribution is equal among eligible suppliers and always limited to your declared capacity (cap). See the public aggregates of the Compra Mais program below.

vitrine.subtitulo: Only bids compatible with your company's CNAE codes. 1 bid = 1 demand.
vitrine.buscaPlaceholder: Search bids by number and name…
vitrine.vazioTitulo: No bids compatible with your line of business at the moment.
vitrine.vazioDica: We'll notify you when a compatible bid becomes available.
vitrine.vazioBuscaTitulo: No bids found for this search.

contestarCnae.sucesso: Contest submitted — please await the Department's review.

alertaErro.descricao: The Municipal Clearance Certificate (PGM) and the Operating License have expired. Notices requiring these documents remain blocked until they are brought up to date.

alertaAtencao.descricao: The Federal Tax Clearance Certificate expires in {{dias}} days ({{data}}). The system's daily scan has already sent a notice by SMS and email. Update it so you don't miss any notices.

minhaConta.subtitulo: Official company data obtained from the Federal Revenue Service (CNPJ API). Only Trade Name, Address and Phone can be edited.

sync.sucesso: Official data updated. Trade Name, Address and Phone were preserved.
sync.revisaoDetalhe: The CNPJ is no longer active at Receita. The data was updated and the case was forwarded to the CPL for review.

estado.erro: Could not load your account data.
estado.semEmpresa: Your account is not linked to a company.

editaveis.salvarErro: Could not save. Please try again.

procuradores.subtitulo: Authorize third parties to act on behalf of the company, with an audit trail for every action.

convite.erro: Could not invite. Check the details and try again.

estado.semEmpresa: No company linked to your account.
estado.somenteTitular: Only the company's data subject can manage attorneys.

painelTitular.subtitulo: Consolidated pending items and your data subject rights (LGPD).
